knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Standard jerkbaits fish 4-5ft and 6-7ft zones. I wanted one that swims down to 12ft — the KVD 300 Series Deep-Diving Jerkbait. Longer bill, dives deeper, suspends, maintains incredible action at depth, and isn't hard to work. Fills a gap where no other jerkbait on the market could reach.'
